creator: wollman@khavrinen.lcs.mit.edu
text:
rlogin -x does not correctly encrypt its output.  Decryption
	works fine.

Fix: 

$ rcp somehost:/usr/bin/rlogin .
	# install -o root -g wheel rlogin /usr/bin
How-To-Repeat: 
	rlogin -x somehost
	# where somehost runs MIT or FreeBSD-3.x v4 or MIT v5 rlogind
	read motd
	press keys, watch garbage accumulate at shell prompt
